Having mapped the repo: a solid [`docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md`](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md) and ADRs exist at the repo root, while the app lives under [`phase2/streamlist/`](phase2/streamlist/); Cursor rules are strong but could be split and scoped. <tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "Agentic AI StreamList",
  "overview": "StreamList already has a canonical project spec at the repo root, Phase 2 Cursor rules, and a Phase 1 prompt-strategy template. This plan recommends how to run agentic work (prompts, scope, verification), how to evolve the spec and keep it consistent with the app, how to strengthen rules without duplication, and which Cursor capabilities to adopt next.",
  "plan": "# Agentic AI, project spec, rules, and Cursor features — StreamList\n\n## What you already have\n\n| Asset | Location | Role |\n|--------|----------|------|\n| **Project spec** | [&#96;docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md&#96;](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md) | Local contract + pointer to [upstream Phase 2 spec](https://github.com/NaveenSinghTTN/ai-first-dev-training-mobile/blob/main/phase-2/project-spec.md) |\n| **ADRs** | [&#96;docs/ADR.md&#96;](docs/ADR.md) | Real decisions (CLI merge, no Reanimated, hydration) — stronger than placeholders still listed in PROJECT_SPEC |\n| **Always-on rules** | [&#96;.cursor/rules/react-native-cursor-rules.mdc&#96;](.cursor/rules/react-native-cursor-rules.mdc) | App root &#96;phase2/streamlist/&#96;, 15 concrete constraints (hooks, API, theme, navigation, etc.) |\n| **Scoped rule** | [&#96;.cursor/rules/streamlist-watchlist.mdc&#96;](.cursor/rules/streamlist-watchlist.mdc) | Globs for watchlist store/screens — good pattern to repeat |\n| **Prompt playbook** | [&#96;phase1/docs/phase-1-prompt-strategy.md&#96;](phase1/docs/phase-1-prompt-strategy.md) | CDIR-style prompts, “Plan mode outline,” verification grep ideas |\n\n**Gap to fix when you implement (not in plan mode):** [&#96;phase2/streamlist/README.md&#96;](phase2/streamlist/README.md) links to &#96;docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md&#96; *inside* &#96;phase2/streamlist/&#96;; the real file is [&#96;docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md&#96;](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md) at repo root. Same for ADR — actual file is [&#96;docs/ADR.md&#96;](docs/ADR.md). Align links or add a one-line pointer under &#96;phase2/streamlist/docs/&#96; so agents and humans do not chase missing paths.\n\n---\n\n## 1. How to use agentic AI effectively in this repo\n\n**Anchor every task to three things:** (1) [&#96;docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md&#96;](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md) + upstream course spec for rubric, (2) [&#96;.cursor/rules/react-native-cursor-rules.mdc&#96;](.cursor/rules/react-native-cursor-rules.mdc), (3) the smallest set of real files (e.g. &#96;src/api/client.ts&#96;, &#96;src/hooks/types.ts&#96;).\n\n**Reuse the Phase 1 CDIR pattern** from [&#96;phase1/docs/phase-1-prompt-strategy.md&#96;](phase1/docs/phase-1-prompt-strategy.md):\n\n- **C**ontext — stack, folder, non-goals (“do not touch navigation”).\n- **D**eliverables — files and exports only.\n- **I**nvariants — “no &#96;any&#96;,” “hooks only from screens,” etc.\n- **R**eview — commands or greps (&#96;npm run lint&#96;, &#96;npm test&#96;, “&#96;fetch&#96; only in client”).\n\n**Scope agents to reduce drift:** one feature or one layer per run (e.g. “only &#96;useSearch&#96; + &#96;SearchScreen&#96;” vs “entire search + detail”). For multi-screen work, use **Plan mode** first (outline files, risks, open questions) — your Phase 1 doc already lists good plan-mode questions for watchlist navigation.\n\n**Verification loop:** after changes, run from &#96;phase2/streamlist/&#96;: &#96;npm run lint&#96;, &#96;npm test&#96;. Mention this in prompts so the agent treats it as part of “done.”\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  spec[PROJECT_SPEC + rules]\n  prompt[CDIR prompt scoped files]\n  impl[Agent implements]\n  verify[lint test manual smoke]\n  spec --\u003e prompt --\u003e impl --\u003e verify\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 2. Strengthening the project spec (without duplicating the course doc)\n\n**Single source of truth:** Keep [&#96;docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md&#96;](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md) as the *short* local contract: stack, env vars, &#96;src/&#96; layout, hook shape, watchlist rules, design tokens. Link out for long rubrics and screen-by-screen tables.\n\n**Keep “implementation truth” accurate:** The tree in PROJECT_SPEC lists &#96;hooks/useHome.ts&#96; etc.; the app also has e.g. [&#96;useSearchExplore.ts&#96;](phase2/streamlist/src/hooks/useSearchExplore.ts), [&#96;useRecentSearches.ts&#96;](phase2/streamlist/src/hooks/useRecentSearches.ts), [&#96;MovieListScreen.tsx&#96;](phase2/streamlist/src/screens/MovieListScreen.tsx). Either extend the spec tree or add “Other hooks/screens: …” so agents do not assume an outdated layout.\n\n**ADR section:** Replace the three “_(placeholder)_” lines in PROJECT_SPEC with “See [&#96;docs/ADR.md&#96;](docs/ADR.md)” or inline summaries so course submission and agent context stay aligned.\n\n**Optional &#96;AGENTS.md&#96; at repo root:** A one-page index (“App: &#96;phase2/streamlist/&#96;”, “Spec: &#96;docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md&#96;”, “Runbook: lint/test/ios/android”, “Do not index: &#96;.specstory/&#96;”) helps Cloud/CLI agents that read &#96;AGENTS.md&#96; by convention. Not required if you prefer minimal files.\n\n---\n\n## 3. Better Cursor rules — incremental, high leverage\n\n**Keep the fat always-applied rule** for global invariants (already good).\n\n**Add glob-scoped rules** mirroring [&#96;streamlist-watchlist.mdc&#96;](.cursor/rules/streamlist-watchlist.mdc), for example:\n\n- **&#96;src/api/**&#96;** — axios only in &#96;client.ts&#96;; TMDB types in &#96;types.ts&#96;; no screen imports.\n- **&#96;src/hooks/**&#96;** — &#96;UseQueryResult&#96;, debounce/cancel for search-related hooks, no direct UI strings.\n- **&#96;src/navigation/**&#96;** — param types in &#96;types.ts&#96;; nested stacks per tab.\n- **&#96;__tests__/**&#96; or &#96;**/*.test.tsx&#96;** — mirror patterns from [&#96;__tests__/App.test.tsx&#96;](phase2/streamlist/__tests__/App.test.tsx); no network in unit tests unless mocked.\n\n**Avoid contradiction:** If a rule repeats the always-applied file, keep scoped rules to *extra* detail (e.g. watchlist-only hydration edge cases).\n\n**&#96;.cursorignore&#96; (optional):** Ignore [&#96;.specstory/&#96;](.specstory/) and other huge generated histories so indexing stays fast and agents see less noise. Add only paths you never want in context.\n\n---\n\n## 4. “Try new features” — Cursor and ecosystem\n\n| Idea | Why it fits StreamList |\n|------|-------------------------|\n| **Skills** (you have [&#96;create-skill&#96;](file:///Users/ttnc2/.cursor/skills-cursor/create-skill/SKILL.md), [&#96;create-rule&#96;](file:///Users/ttnc2/.cursor/skills-cursor/create-rule/SKILL.md)) | Encode a repeatable “StreamList feature” skill: open spec → scoped rules → CDIR prompt → lint/test. |\n| **Hooks** ([&#96;create-hook&#96; skill](file:///Users/ttnc2/.cursor/skills-cursor/create-hook/SKILL.md)) | Automate post-edit reminders (e.g. run lint in &#96;phase2/streamlist&#96; after TS changes). |\n| **MCP** | Use **React Native Development Guide** for version-specific RN questions; **Figma** only if you sync design tokens. Inspect tool schemas under your MCP folder before calling tools. |\n| **Multi-agent / parallel tasks** | Split “API + types” vs “UI” across sessions when changes are independent; merge after both pass lint. |\n\n---\n\n## 5. Suggested priority order (when you exit plan mode)\n\n1. Fix README/spec links under &#96;phase2/streamlist/&#96; and refresh PROJECT_SPEC layout vs actual &#96;src/&#96;.\n2. Add 1–2 glob rules (&#96;api&#96;, &#96;hooks&#96; or &#96;navigation&#96;) if those areas get frequent agent edits.\n3. Optional: &#96;.cursorignore&#96; for &#96;.specstory/&#96;, optional &#96;AGENTS.md&#96; index.\n4. Optional: a small internal “Phase 2 prompt strategy” doc that copies CDIR + verification from Phase 1, pointed at current file names.\n\nThis keeps changes minimal while making agentic work more reliable and the spec trustworthy.\n",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "Align phase2/streamlist README (and any docs) with real paths: docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md and docs/ADR.md at repo root, or add thin pointers under phase2/streamlist/docs/",
      "id": "fix-readme-spec-links",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Update docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md src/ tree and ADR section to match phase2/streamlist (e.g. useSearchExplore, useRecentSearches, MovieListScreen) and remove placeholder ADR bullets",
      "id": "refresh-project-spec-tree",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Add 1–2 glob-scoped .mdc rules for src/api and src/hooks (and optionally navigation/tests) without duplicating always-applied invariants",
      "id": "add-scoped-cursor-rules",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Optionally add repo-root AGENTS.md index and .cursorignore for .specstory/ to speed indexing",
      "id": "optional-agents-cursorignore",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "Optional: short phase2/docs prompt-strategy mirroring phase1 CDIR + verification commands for phase2/streamlist",
      "id": "phase2-prompt-playbook",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  ]
}
```

_**Agent (composer-2)**_


Here’s what was implemented:

### 1. README / spec links
- **[`phase2/streamlist/README.md`](phase2/streamlist/README.md)** — Project docs now link to repo-root [`../../docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md`](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md) and [`../../docs/ADR.md`](docs/ADR.md).
- **[`phase2/streamlist/docs/README.md`](phase2/streamlist/docs/README.md)** — Short pointers to root `docs/` and the Phase 2 prompt doc.
- **[`README.md`](README.md)** — Table updated: `docs/` row for spec/ADR; `phase2/streamlist` row points at the new app `docs/README.md`.

### 2. Project spec refresh — [`docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md`](docs/PROJECT_SPEC.md)
- **`.env.example`** → [`phase2/streamlist/.env.example`](phase2/streamlist/.env.example).
- **`src/` tree** — Includes hooks (`useSearchExplore`, `useRecentSearches`), `MovieListScreen`, `components/icons`, theme (`fontFamily`, `iconSizes`), `utils/format`, `genres`; notes app root `phase2/streamlist/`.
- **Screens table** — `MovieListScreen` row added.
- **Deviations** — Placeholders removed; points to **[`ADR.md`](docs/ADR.md)** for real decisions.

### 3. Scoped Cursor rules (under [`.cursor/rules/`](.cursor/rules/))
- **`streamlist-api.mdc`** — API-only Axios/client/movies/types; hooks consume API, not screens.
- **`streamlist-hooks.mdc`** — `UseQueryResult`, debounce + `AbortSignal` for search-style hooks.
- **`streamlist-navigation-tests.mdc`** — Typed navigation; tests mock network, follow existing Jest patterns.

Globs support **both** repo-root and `phase2/streamlist` workspace roots (`**/phase2/streamlist/...` and `**/src/...` / `**/__tests__/**` where appropriate).

### 4. `AGENTS.md` and `.cursorignore`
- **[`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md)** — App root, canonical docs, lint/test commands, rules index, prompt playbooks, `.specstory` note.
- **[`.cursorignore`](.cursorignore)** — Ignores `.specstory/` (created via shell after sandbox denied the first write).

### 5. Phase 2 prompt playbook — [`phase2/docs/phase-2-prompt-strategy.md`](phase2/docs/phase-2-prompt-strategy.md)
- CDIR template, verification commands, plan-mode notes, scope rules, quick failure checks; links to `PROJECT_SPEC`, rules, and Phase 1 plan-mode doc.

**Verification:** `npm run lint` and `npm test` were run from `phase2/streamlist/` — all passed (23 tests).

---

add pull to refresh in home screen and details page, get the actual content of each screen, create similar skeleton and update the skeleton, so that height matches with the actual content and UI feels smooth during loading
